headlines.title: UK tribunal gives go ahead for $4 billion lawsuit against Apple over iCloud services
SpaceX isn't the only Big Tech stock getting crushed — check out the destruction in Salesforce
Is BXP Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
What Makes Microsoft (MSFT) a Strong Position Amid Challenges?
Is Texas Pacific Land Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
Gold prices today, Tuesday, June 23: Prices move lower along with analyst expectations
3 Market Signs Bitcoin Selling Pressure May Be Losing Strength
Intel Will Design and Manufacture Chips for Apple. What This Really Means for INTC Stock Investors.
Marvell Just Got a New Street-High Price Target. Wall Street Thinks Networking Is a Huge Growth Opportunity.
Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
headlines.desc: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
headlines.desc: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

headlines.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
headlines.desc: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

headlines.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
headlines.desc: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the growth prospects of these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Continued volatility presents an opportunity to find stocks trading at attractive prices and benefit from their long-term growth potential.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Why the oil may start flowing through the Strait of Hormuz faster than many believe
headlines.desc: Brian Sullivan's direct conversations with industry executives and experts based both here and in the Middle East indicate ships will start steaming.

headlines.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
headlines.desc: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
headlines.desc: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

headlines.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
headlines.desc: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.

headlines.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
headlines.desc: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

headlines.title: The May inflation numbers are due out Wednesday morning. Here's what to expect
headlines.desc: If the Wall Street consensus is correct, the consumer price index is expected to show inflation running at a 4.2% annual rate.

headlines.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares
headlines.desc: The biggest IPO has been digested without a hiccup, and Wall Street's  so-called "fear gauge" is back below its long-term average.

headlines.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
headlines.desc: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

headlines.title: Traders are loving this cheap way to make big bets against chip stocks
headlines.desc: Just a day after making new all-time records, the semiconductor sector is down almost 7% and traders are finding a cheap way to bet on a bigger pivot.

headlines.title: Consumer prices rose 4.2% annually in May, highest in three years
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to show a 4.2% gain from a year ago, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.

headlines.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
headlines.desc: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.

headlines.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
headlines.desc: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

headlines.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
headlines.desc: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

headlines.title: Has the worst of the Hormuz crisis passed?
headlines.desc: Ships are moving again through the Strait of Hormuz, with oil prices falling. But relief for consumers may take longer.
